# NLU Cloud
> Independent essays on AI, language, cognition, society, education, humanities, and everyday life.

## About
NLU Cloud publishes editorial essays translated from published research on human–AI interaction.
Research papers on SSRN are authoritative sources; essays are public translations — often several per paper.

## Author
Liang Zhang · Independent Researcher
https://orcid.org/0009-0002-0124-1706

## Sections
- /essays/ — Editorial essays (six columns)
- /frameworks/ — Named research concepts
- /research/ — SSRN paper index
- /editors-notes/ — Editor's notes

## Citation
Cite SSRN source papers for academic use. Essays are editorial derivatives.
